action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline DLinear (individual=False, no RevIN) achieved MSE=0.5038. Training on CPU takes ~15 min for 20 epochs. Analysis: Key improvements to try: (1) individual=True allows per-channel linear layers (7x more params but still <1M), known to significantly help multivariate forecasting; (2) RevIN removes instance-level distribution shifts, very effective for non-stationary time series. Decision: Implement both improvements, train for 25 epochs, submit eval immediately.
